title: Top voted Python question on Stack Overflow
goal: Find the highest-voted Python question on Stack Overflow and report its score and tags.
rubric: Reports the top-voted Python SO question with score and tags.
final_answer: Top-voted Python question on Stack Overflow: 'Why is it string.join (list) instead of list.join(string)?' — asked by Alex Coventry, 1,800,000+ score, tags: python string list join.
